flags.label: First-year retention
flags.summary: First-year retention at Columbia Central University-Caguas fell 29% between 2021 and 2024 (88.2% → 63.1%).

flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at Columbia Central University-Caguas rose 21% between 2019 and 2020 ($5.1k → $6.1k).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Columbia Central University-Caguas rose 14% between 2021 and 2024 ($7.4k → $8.4k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Columbia Central University-Caguas rose 14% between 2021 and 2024 ($7.4k → $8.4k).
